name: Bug Report

title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Diagnostics & Logs
Please paste any relevant lines from the **Logs** tab here. Do NOT include raw document files, API keys, or private identifiers.

## Environment Details
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 16 Pro Max, iOS Simulator]
- OS Version: [e.g. iOS 17.5, macOS Catalyst 14.2]
- Xcode Version: [e.g. 16.0]
- OpenAI Model Used: [e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-5]
- Pinecone Index Type: [e.g. serverless]

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the problem here.
